title: Proclamation No. 72, s. 1966
text:
MALACAÑANG RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 72

ESTABLISHING AS POLILLO WATERSHED FOREST RESERVE THE PARCEL OF PUBLIC DOMAIN PER B.F. MAP NO. WR-2, SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF POLILLO, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, PHILIPPINES.

Upon recommendation of the Director of Forestry, approved by the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the provisions of Section 1826 of the Revised Administrative Code, as amended by Republic Act No. 3092, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from entry, sale, settlement or other disposition and establish and proclaim as POLILLO WATERSHED FOREST RESERVE, subject to private rights, if any there be, the parcel of the public domain located in the Municipality of Polillo, Province of Quezon under the administration and control of the Director of Forestry who shall have the authority to regulate the use and occupancy of said watershed forest reserve and the cutting, collection and removal of timber and other forest products therein in accordance with the forest laws and regulations.

The aforementioned parcel of public domain is more particularly described as follows:

Beginning at point marked “1” on B.F. Map No. WR-2 is a White Lauan tree 50 cms. in diameter which is identical to corner No. 39, Alienable or Disposable Block XII, Quezon Land Classification Project No . -19-C;

Thence N40°W, 180 meters to corner 2, Apitong 70 cms. in diameter; Thence N36°E, 295 meters to corner 3, Red Lauan 80 cms. in diameter; Thence N42°E, 270 meters to corner 4, White Lauan 30 cms. in diameter; Thence N18°W, 210 meters to corner 5, Apitong 30 cms. in diameter; Thence N13°W, 270 meters to corner 6, Pangnan 40 cms. in diameter; Thence N75°W, 200 meters to corner 7, Palaspas 30 cms. in diameter; Thence N80°W, 220 meters to corner 8, Yakal 50 cms. in diameter; Thence S69°W, 300 meters to corner 9, Apitong 50 cms. in diameter; Thence N80°W, 100 meters to corner 10, White Lauan 40 cms. in diameter; Thence N80°W, 350 meters to corner 11, Bagtikan 40 cms. in diameter; Thence N71°W, 270 meters to corner 12, Dalingdingan 30 cms. in diameter; Thence N14°W, 110 meters to corner 13, Red Lauan 60 cms. in diameter; Thence N55°E, 315 meters to corner 14, Misc. Sp. 40 cms. in diameter; Thence N4°E, 300 meters to corner 15, Misc. Sp. 30 cms. in diameter; Thence S73°E, 270 meters to corner 16, Red Lauan 50 cms. in diameter; Thence S47°E, 270 meters to corner 17, Bagtikan 60 cms. in diameter; Thence S79°E, 340 meters to corner 18, White Lauan 30 cms. in diameter; Thence N81°E, 240 meters to corner 19, Dalingdingan 30 cms. in diameter; Thence S59°E, 280 meters to corner 20, Bulala 20 cms. in diameter; Thence S30°E, 400 meters to corner 21, Misc. Sp. 30 cms. in diameter; Thence S77°E, 380 meters to corner 22, Apitong 30 cms. in diameter; Thence S56°E, 120 meters to corner 23, Apitong 30 cms. in diameter; Thence S5°W, 160 meters to corner 24, Narig 50 cms. in diameter; Thence S25°W, 220 meters to corner 25, Unknown tree; Thence S40°W, 140 meters to corner 26, Makaasim 30 cms. in diameter; Thence S59°W, 280 meters to corner 27, Dalingdingan 30 cms. in diameter; Thence S63°W, 280 meters to corner 28, Mayapis 25 cms. in diameter; Thence S70°W, 280 meters to corner 1 the point of beginning containing an area of ONE HUNDRED THIRTY (130) HECTARES, more or less.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 9th day of August, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-six.

(SGD.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President:

(SGD.) RAFAEL M. SALAS Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
